channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th May
item.description:
The bind at 29 Alexandra grove are regularly overflowing. Despite there being two only one is used. Please could you explore giving them another Jin. It is unsightly, it smells and the rubbish is attracting flies.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive littering and fly-tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Ongoing issue of rubbish being dumped in massive quantities on this site. Unsightly, attracting vermin and, on a hot day, disgusting odour. This is a continual problem on this site and should be addressed through proper sanitation facilities
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arcola Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in back garden, 25th May
item.description:
Seen a dead fox in my back garden today 140 Bowen drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowen Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flattened parking sign - trip hazard - dangerous, 25th May
item.description:
Over a week of this sign being flattened to the pavement where it creates a trip hazard and the sign edge could cause serious injury if someone were to fall in it. This requires urgent action to prevent injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pocock Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging plants on pavement Orchard Road, 25th May
item.description:
Building site at St Raphael’s Care home on Orchard Road is obstructing up to half of the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left to accumulate behind green utility box needs removing please, 25th May
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter/flytipping on Hurst street estate grounds, 25th May
item.description:
Pathway on grounds of Hurst street estate between the primary school and Herne hill house clothing gas canisters strewn everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herne Place, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water coming out of the side road gully, 25th May
item.description:
On the pavement in front of house 105 Winn Road a Thames water road side gully is over flowing for the last 2 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winn Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees and hedges blocking the satellite signal and so not getting tv channels and also causing damp and attracting a lot of pest in the house, 25th May
item.description:
We had the sky engineer come out today to look at the lack of satellite signal and us no longer being able to get our TV channels and they were immediately able to confirm that it was the trees surrounding the house. They said a tree is in line with the satellite dish, blocking the signal. They put this dish in because another tree was blocking the original satellite dish we had a while ago and now the problem has arose again with the trees growing and blocking this new dish. They can put another third dish because the signal will be affected wherever they position it. They also confirmed that another tree against the wall of the house is causing the damp inside our house and a large number of insects etc to come in the house and the high hedges surrounding the house is also encouraging the insects etc. Also not sure if there is also something hidden/been in the hedges for a while there too as seen a lot of animals go there such as cats and foxes and not sure if any prey has been left there. Please could the trees be cut down as matter of urgency and also the hedges surrounding the house. Our property is 22 Erickson Gardens, Bromley, Kent, BR3 9TJ. Many thanks, kind regards Josephina.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erickson Gardens, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken drain cover, 25th May
item.description:
Dangerous broken drain cover creating fall hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43-45, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular fly tipping by a local restaurant nearby, 25th May
item.description:
The items fly tipped get cleared by bin men but the Council needs to investigate this. The culprit’s name is on the items dumped. The Council needs to levy a hefty fine on the culprit so that they stop fly tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Mackay Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of Hampstead heath overground station, 25th May
item.description:
Rental bikes are blocking one entire lane of south hill park. Cars can’t get past. It’s out of all proportion. Make sure a) they get collected asap and b) the rental companies get fined.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Hill Park, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs, lawn mower, black sacks. edge of pavement outside 118 john ruskin street, 25th May
item.description:
Dumped last night by residents of 213 john ruskin street. they do this every week cos they have seven residents and only one green bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large collection of litter on pavement, 25th May
item.description:
Large broken rubbish bag with litter spilling onto pavement and road, discovered over weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 391-437, Friern Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 25th May
item.description:
There are food packaging, plastic bottles, foid waste, tissue, paper, cans and cups on the pavement and road along Tabard street. Especially near the park, rental bikes. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on path, 25th May
item.description:
The usual gas canisters and lager cans scattered all over the pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hythe Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter at planter on Tabard Street, 25th May
item.description:
There is a microwave dumped at the planter. There are also plastic bottles, food packaging and cans dumped at the planters. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Taking up a parking spot in the lay-by

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
